reason: Authoritative tokens: --space-*, --text-*, --radius-*, --touch-min, status alpha tokens, three-state theme. New v5 CSS MUST consume these tokens (no hard-coded px). Also defines the Mobile-adaptation rule: mobile-only changes live inside @media (max-width: 768px) blocks; desktop rules must stay untouched.
Component patterns referenced by the overhaul (cards, buttons, pills, badges, sheet modals). Confirm class names + tier conventions before adding new ones.
Quality bars for accessibility (44pt taps, reduced-motion), light/dark parity, and version-bump rule (bump CURRENT_VERSION when shipping visible UI change).
